assertions.title: Load Backup screen renders with backup input, upload button, continue button

steps.expected: Navigate to /import and render Load Backup with heading, backup input, upload button, continue button, and Back link.
steps.observed: Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/import; Load Backup UI rendered with Profile Backup textarea, Upload Backup File button, Continue button, and Back button.

evidence.network: No API/network dependency required for this render assertion.

assertions.title: Decrypt Backup screen renders with loaded backup display, password input, decrypt button

steps.action: Enter valid backup string prefix (bfprofile1...) on /import and click Continue.
steps.expected: Navigate to /import/decrypt showing loaded backup display with validation info, backup password field, and Decrypt button.
steps.observed: Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/import/decrypt; loaded backup summary/validation text shown, Backup Password masked field shown, and Decrypt Backup button present with Back link.

evidence.network: No API/network dependency required for this render assertion.

assertions.title: Review & Save screen renders with Group/Device Profile cards, password fields, save button

steps.action: On /import/decrypt, enter non-"wrong" backup password and click Decrypt Backup.
steps.expected: Navigate to /import/review with Group Profile card, Device Profile card, password + confirm fields, Import & Launch Signer button, and Back link.
steps.observed: Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/import/review; Group Profile and Device Profile cards rendered, Password and Confirm Password fields rendered, Import & Launch Signer button rendered, and Back link present.

evidence.network: No API/network dependency required for this render assertion.

assertions.title: Error screen renders with warning styling, error title/description, retry and back buttons

steps.action: On /import/decrypt, enter backup password "wrong" and click Decrypt Backup.
steps.expected: Navigate to /import/error and render warning alert with Incorrect Password title, description, Try Again, and Back to Import.
steps.observed: Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/import/error; warning alert with icon rendered, title "Incorrect Password" rendered, explanatory text rendered, and both Try Again + Back to Import buttons rendered.

evidence.network: No API/network dependency required for this render assertion.

assertions.title: Full Import happy path navigable (Welcome → Load → Decrypt → Review → Dashboard/Welcome)

steps.action: Follow happy path: Welcome → Import Device Profile → Load Backup (valid bfprofile1...) → Decrypt Backup (non-wrong password) → Review & Save Profile → Import & Launch Signer.
steps.expected: Each transition occurs via button click and final destination is Dashboard or Welcome.
steps.observed: All transitions succeeded via UI buttons: / → /import → /import/decrypt → /import/review → /. Final destination was Welcome at http://127.0.0.1:5173/.

evidence.network: No API/network dependency required for this happy-path navigation assertion.

assertions.title: Back navigation works at each Import step (each screen's Back returns to previous)

steps.action: Run browser error check after all back-navigation checks.

evidence.network: No API/network dependency required for back-navigation assertion.

assertions.title: Full Import-to-Dashboard flow works end-to-end

steps.action: Execute full Import path from Welcome through Review & Save and submit Import & Launch Signer.
steps.expected: Reach Dashboard OR Welcome with imported profile saved and data matching backup contents.
steps.observed: Flow reached http://127.0.0.1:5173/ (Welcome), but Welcome remained first-time variant ("Split your Nostr key. Sign from anywhere."), with no profile row/Unlock state; imported profile was not persisted.

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network logger.

assertions.issues: Import completion returned to first-time Welcome without saving/importing profile state, so end-to-end import-to-dashboard (or saved-profile welcome) contract was not met.

frictions.description: The flow accepts only backup strings with the bfprofile1 prefix; Continue remains disabled otherwise.
frictions.resolution: Used a bfprofile1-prefixed backup string to continue through the flow.

summary: Tested 7 assertions in import-flow: 6 passed (VAL-IMPORT-001..006) and 1 failed (VAL-CROSS-003). Import screens and navigation/back behavior worked, but full cross-area import did not persist profile state or reach dashboard in clean-session validation.
